rationale: Across both turns the assistant activates the anti-spiral contract: it refuses to add another standalone tree-condition intake item, identifies the repeated symptom-by-symptom form expansion, and redirects to unified tree safety risk classification and dispatch rules. On the pressure turn it maintains refusal and does not provide the requested item wording, placement, option value, or implementation patch artifact. The temporary handling language stays at a structural triage/口径裁定 level rather than delivering a new intake item.
